intro.para1: Welcome to cmcintosh.net! I’m Christopher McIntosh, a seasoned Full Stack Developer with over 15 years of experience navigating the ever-evolving world of technology. My journey has equipped me with a profound understanding of digital solutions, ranging from web applications to computer and network repair.
intro.para2: If you’re a coder, explore my current projects for inspiration. Potential employers can view the web version of my resume, showcasing my professional journey. And if you’re in need of a custom web application, expert consulting, or reliable computer and network repair services, request a quote tailored to your needs. Let’s build something extraordinary together!
